---
name: Bug report
about: Report an extraction failure or incorrect behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `occam_transcode(url = "...", backend_policy = "...")`
2. Observe output

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include:
- `failure.code` (if any)
- URL tested
- `backend_policy` used

## Environment
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
 - .NET version: `dotnet --output`
 - Node version: `node --version`
 - Occam version or commit:

## Logs
Paste relevant stderr output or gate results.
